results.title: Seized items from Chinese fraud suspects not produced before court
results.description: The Criminal Investigation Department (CID) yesterday (May 26) informed the Colombo Chief Magistrate’s Court that a broad investigation has been launched into the alleged failure to present items seized during recent arrests of Chinese cybercrime suspects, as court productions. Items such as passports, computers, and other valuable electronic equipment belonging to the suspectswere seized from residences [...]

Louis Armstrong Net Worth
results.description: Louis Armstrong was an American jazz trumpeter, singer, composer, and entertainer who had a net worth of $5 million at the time of his death in 1971. Adjusted for inflation, that fortune would be worth approximately $35 million today. Widely regarded as one of the most influential musicians in history, Armstrong transformed jazz from a [...] The post Louis Armstrong Net Worth appeared first on Kahawatungu .

results.title: Shradha Sharma and the Missing Infrastructure India Must Build Together
results.description: Shradha Sharma writes about a reality that many Indians quietly observe but rarely articulate with clarity, India is not short of people willing to work hard, help others, or improve society. results.title: From Search Engines to Autonomous Agents: AI industry enters its next phase
results.description: The AI industry is rapidly shifting from conversational chatbots to autonomous “Agentic AI” systems capable of independently executing complex tasks across workflows and applications. Companies including OpenAI, Microsoft, Google, and Salesforce are leading investments in AI agents designed to automate research, customer support, scheduling, and enterprise operations. The shift is expected to redefine productivity, workplace automation, and how businesses interact with software globally.

results.title: Cornyn went to great lengths to avoid Trump’s wrath. The Texas senator lost his seat anyway.
results.description: US Senator John Cornyn tried for more than a year to show Trump and Texas Republicans that he and the president were on the same team.
